# Velociti

Velociti deploys secure, high-performance, enterprise-grade AI systems and autonomous agents that integrate directly into existing workflows and databases to automate core business operations.

## Core Offerings & Services

### 1. AI Operations Automation
- **Description**: Autonomously reasoning agents that synchronize with ERPs, perform auto-reconciliation, audit financial records, compile compliance data, and execute workflow pipelines.
- **Key Metrics**: Eliminates 95% of manual reporting work; 24/7 continuous daemons.
- **Integrations**: Custom back-ends, ERP data, SQL Databases, Slack alert reporting.

### 2. AI Customer Support Systems
- **Description**: Low-latency multilingual voice-native and text-based support agents handling L1/L2 customer queries and proactive ticketing follow-ups.
- **Key Metrics**: Latency under 1.4 seconds (voice); 99.2% resolution rates.
- **Integrations**: Zendesk, Salesforce, internal knowledge bases, custom telephony.

### 3. AI Sales Automation
- **Description**: Autonomous SDR (Sales Development Representative) systems executing hyper-personalized outbound outreach sequences, lead qualification, and CRM updates.
- **Key Metrics**: Hyper-personalized lead qualification; direct booking of qualified sales meetings.
- **Integrations**: HubSpot, Salesforce, Outreach.

### 4. Enterprise Knowledge AI (RAG)
- **Description**: Secure Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines bridging company data silos into unified vector search systems.
- **Key Metrics**: Zero-hallucination compliance checking; millisecond-level document queries.
- **Integrations**: Slack, Notion, Jira, Amazon S3, PDF docs, custom vector databases.

---

## Technical Specifications & Infrastructure

- **Deployment Model**: Fully managed cloud or on-premise private deployment (Virtual Private Cloud / VPC).
- **Security & Compliance**: End-to-end encryption, strict RAG security boundaries, GDPR/HIPAA-ready systems.
- **Latency**: Voice interaction latency of 1.2–1.4 seconds.
- **Implementation Speed**: 4 to 11 weeks average deployment to production, compared to 12-18 months legacy dev times.

---

## Leadership
- **Manoj Kurapati**, Founder & CEO: Focused on rewiring corporate infrastructure to run on agentic logic.
- **Fatima Qazi**, COO: Directing enterprise alignment, cost reduction, and business outcomes.
